refined_caption: The hospital food tray appears unappetizing. A patient is sleeping in the background, seemingly uninterested in the food.
complaint_description: I was disappointed to see the hospital food tray looked unappetizing, which made me lose my appetite. The presentation was uninviting and I was expecting a more appealing meal. This experience was not what I expected from a hospital.
voice_text: The food here looks really unappetizing, I'm not even hungry anymore. It's just not what I expected from a hospital.
